name: Newborn Care
signals: High wipes usage in first 30 days
parentMessage: You are settling into the earliest routines. Gentle essentials can make everyday care feel more manageable.

name: Diaper Size 1
signals: Size 1 diaper box added to cart
parentMessage: Your baby may be moving into a new fit and feeding rhythm. A small stock-up now can keep things calm.

name: Diaper Size 2
parentMessage: This stage often brings a little more predictability. Replenishing the basics helps you stay one step ahead.

name: Diaper Size 3
parentMessage: Many families reach an important transition here. It can be a good moment to start preparing for what may come next.

name: Feeding Routine
parentMessage: Feeding habits are becoming more established. A few thoughtful upgrades can make daily routines easier.

name: Starting Solids
parentMessage: This next chapter can feel exciting and tender. A few supportive essentials can help the transition feel smooth.

name: Sitting Support
signals: High chair added to order history
parentMessage: Your baby may be getting steadier and more curious. Comfort and support items can encourage the next steps.

name: Crawling Prep
parentMessage: Movement is often just around the corner here. Safe, engaging play essentials can make this stage feel joyful.

name: First Shoes
parentMessage: Early steps bring big feelings. Soft, supportive essentials can help families feel ready without rushing.

name: Toddler Snacks
parentMessage: Your little one may be exploring more independence at mealtime. Familiar, practical staples can keep things simple.
